label: A cleaner, more legible home screen
items: Home cards now share one calm, consistent look with softer, on-brand shadows.
Your daily status line is clearer and easier to read at a glance.
Soil, valve and alert chips now respond properly to High Contrast mode — better for gardening in bright sun or with low vision.
The layout switch on your greeting is now larger and easier to tap, with proper screen-reader labels.
